title: António Lobo Antunes, One of Europe’s Most Revered Writers, Dies at 83
summary_full: In a career studded with literary awards, he was the author of dozens of books that grappled with his nation’s legacy of dictatorship and colonialism.
summary_public: In a career studded with literary awards, he was the author of dozens of books that grappled with his nation’s legacy of dictatorship and colonialism.
